Marazul Resort  ·  Cancún

Bodas &
Eventos.

Celebra los momentos más importantes de tu vida frente al Caribe. Bodas, quinceañeras, eventos corporativos y reuniones privadas — todo con la vista y el servicio que mereces.

Cotiza tu Evento ← Back to Resort

Weddings & Special Events

The perfect
setting for
your big day.

Marazul offers a unique setting in Cancún: the most spectacular pool in the area, gardens facing the Caribbean, and direct marina access — all in one place.

01 Ceremony

Weddings

Say yes by the Caribbean Sea. We offer open-air spaces by the pool and private areas for the reception and banquet.

  • Civil or religious ceremony
  • Reception & banquet
  • Full event coordination
  • Guest accommodation
Quote a wedding →
02 Celebration

Quinceañeras & Sweet 15

A fairy-tale setting for the most important party of her life. Marazul's pool and gardens create the perfect backdrop for an unforgettable night.

  • Dance floor & stage
  • Professional lighting & sound
  • Custom catering
  • Photo session included
Quote a quinceañera →
03 Corporate

Corporate Events

Conferences, team meetings, product launches or team-building — with the infrastructure and atmosphere your company needs.

  • Meeting rooms & auditorium
  • Audiovisual equipment
  • Coffee breaks & gala dinners
  • Nautical teambuilding activities
Quote an event →

What are you celebrating?

Every occasion,
a unique event.

I

Consulta

Cuéntanos tu visión — tipo de evento, fecha, número de invitados. Sin compromiso.

→
II

Planificación

Nuestro equipo diseña una propuesta a medida con todos los detalles cubiertos.

→
III

Celebración

El día llega. Tú disfrutas. Nosotros nos encargamos de que todo funcione perfecto.
